# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals
* Improve system latency by 20%
* Optimize database queries for faster response times
* Refactor key modules for better computational efficiency
## Q2 Goals
* Implement new user authentication module
* Develop real-time analytics dashboard
* Integrate machine learning recommendation engine
